DK0_XFB_XFF_H79Ph2_J87_HHA_HJD_LJC_X52_v4.2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: TCM

    "minbytes": 122,

      "RDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Vehicle Speed signal": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Vehicle Speed sensor(Km/h)": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Vehicle Speed sensor(RPM)": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Engine RPM": {
        "firstbyte": 11
      },
      "Sec Pressure sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      },
      "Oil Temperature sensor": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "G Sensor(ATCU)": {
        "firstbyte": 14
      },
      "VIGN Voltage": {
        "firstbyte": 15
      },
      "Vehicle speed($2101)": {
        "firstbyte": 16
      },
      "Vehicle speed for shift control": {
        "firstbyte": 17
      },

        "firstbyte": 18
      },
      "Pri revolution": {
        "firstbyte": 19
      },
      "Sec revolution": {
        "firstbyte": 20
      },

        "firstbyte": 21
      },

        "firstbyte": 22
      },

        "firstbyte": 23
      },

        "firstbyte": 24
      },
      "Current SubGear position": {
        "firstbyte": 26
      },
      "Acceleration": {
        "firstbyte": 27
      },
      "APO": {
        "firstbyte": 28
      },
      "Throttle Openning": {
        "firstbyte": 29
      },

        "firstbyte": 30
      },

        "firstbyte": 31
      },

        "firstbyte": 32
      },

        "firstbyte": 33
      },

        "firstbyte": 35
      },

        "firstbyte": 36

        "firstbyte": 37

        "firstbyte": 38

        "firstbyte": 50
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 80,
        "bitoffset": 2

        "firstbyte": 82

        "firstbyte": 83

        "firstbyte": 86,
        "bitoffset": 1

        "firstbyte": 86,
        "bitoffset": 2

        "bitoffset": 4

        "firstbyte": 86,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 87

        "firstbyte": 88

      "Target SubGear Ratio": {
        "firstbyte": 89

        "firstbyte": 90

        "firstbyte": 92

        "firstbyte": 94

        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 8
      },

        "firstbyte": 9

    "sentbytes": "21EF",
    "name": "DAIMLER Identification",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "700000",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3000000000",
    "name": "OutputControl",
    "deny_sds": [
      "nosds"
    ],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

    }
  },
